The [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]] '''HSB-200''' was a small blaster that was barely considered a [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]]. Design decisions by BlasTech made it almost a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] instead of a holdout. It was not particularly effective, and was considered more for show than actual combat.

{{Weapon-stub}}
